description: Returns a list of workflow instances for a given project.

parameters.name: filters[tool_type]
parameters.description: Filter instances with matching tool type.

parameters.name: filters[tool_subtype]
parameters.description: Filter instances by tool subtype.  Required when tool_type is 'correspondence'.

parameters.name: filters[item_id]
parameters.description: Filter instances with matching item id.

parameters.name: filters[assignee_id]
parameters.description: Filter instances with matching current assignee.

parameters.name: filters[active]
parameters.description: Return only instances that are active.

parameters.name: filters[overdue]
parameters.description: Return only instances whose next workflow step is overdue.

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Cursor location where the returned list of items are before or after this cursor location.

id.description: Unique identifier for the workflow instance

tool_subtype.description: The subtype of the associated tool (used for correspondence)

tool_type.description: The type of the associated tool

created_at.description: Date when the instance was created

updated_at.description: Date when the instance was last updated

started_at.description: Date when the instance was started
